On June 19, 2013, the Company issued a press release announcing that it had signed a definitive agreement to acquire Exacq Technologies, Inc. for $150 million in cash.
On September 15, 2011, the Company issued a press release announcing that it had reached an agreement to acquire Visonic Ltd. (TASE: VSC.TA) for approximately $100 million in cash.

On March 21, 2011, the Company issued a press release announcing that it had signed a definitive agreement to acquire a 75% equity stake in privately-held KEF Holdings Ltd. for approximately $300 million in cash.
On December 22, 2010, Tyco International Ltd. issued a press release announcing that it had completed the sale of a majority interest in its Electrical and Metal Products business.
On July 29, 2010, the Company issued a press release announcing that it has agreed to sell its European Waterworks business within its Flow Control segment for approximately $245 million.
